entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-sdc-be-common-master-verify-java/173/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-sdc-be-common-master-verify-java/173

Abandoned

Abandoning: dependency already updated to >= target version on master. This change is redundant due to a historical change-correlation bug in the lfreleng-actions/github2gerrit-action that left orphaned changes when dependabot updated PRs in place. Cleanup performed to resync Gerrit and GitHub state.
